hierarchy.h3: text-xl font-medium tracking-wide text-primary-accent font-display uppercase
hierarchy.caption: text-xs tracking-wider uppercase text-text-secondary
hierarchy.code: text-xs font-mono text-text-primary bg-surface p-1 rounded

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-full border-r border-border bg-background z-40 md:relative md:translate-x-0 transition-transform
layout_and_spacing.content_area: flex-1 ml-0 md:ml-64 p-4 md:p-8 bg-background min-h-screen

buttons.primary: bg-primary-accent text-background px-6 py-2 uppercase font-display tracking-wider hover:bg-primary-accent-hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-border text-text-primary px-6 py-2 uppercase font-display tracking-wider hover:border-primary-accent transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-surface border border-border text-text-primary p-3 focus:border-primary-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary-accent transition-all outline-none w-full

badges.base: px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border

sidebar_links.base: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-text-secondary hover:text-primary-accent hover:bg-surface transition-all

components.toast: bg-surface border border-border text-text-primary p-4 rounded-none shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

chat_avatars.description: Customer in black and white hoodie

testing_attributes.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No teal, no purple. Use only deep blacks, whites, and gold.
Ensure all components have 'rounded-none' for sharp, editorial edges, matching luxury streetwear aesthetic.
Implement the layout as mobile-first. The sidebar MUST be a drawer on mobile screens (<768px), and fixed on desktop.
For typography, use Bebas Neue for all headings (H1, H2, H3) and Outfit for body text. JetBrains Mono for the logs area.
The Dashboard must contain 4 specific KPI cards: Messages today, Unique clients, Products viewed, Resolution rate.
Include a live log panel with monospace font and color-coded statuses (INFO, SUCCESS, WARN, ERROR).
Use Lucide React icons. Emojis are strictly forbidden.
Ensure input elements have a distinct focus state featuring the gold accent color.
All files created must be .js/.jsx, not .tsx.
Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element for testing.
